coze.guideBot: Chat Bot: only Coze agents appear here; apps (e.g. writing tools) are excluded. Bind plugins/skills to the bot in Coze Studio.
coze.guideWorkflow: Workflows: optional sub-capabilities. Sync or add them in Step 2 after saving the agent for slash-menu access.
coze.guideSkillTool: Skills / tools: inherited from the bot in Coze. No duplicate setup here unless fine-grained access is added later.

coze.workspace: Loaded from Coze API after selecting a connector
coze.bot: Published bot; plugins and skills come from Coze Studio

coze.savedContinueWorkflow: Agent saved. Configure workflows below (optional), then close the drawer.

discovery.loadFailed: Failed to load from Coze. Check connector API key and endpoint (default api.coze.cn).
discovery.emptyWorkspace: No workspaces returned. Verify PAT workspace permissions.
discovery.emptyBot: No bots returned. Apps are excluded; agents must be API-published or accessible drafts.

workflows.title: Workflows (Step 2, optional)
workflows.hint: Fetched from Coze at runtime when empty; add rows for fine-grained access
workflows.pending: Save the agent above first. Workflow configuration appears after save.
workflows.empty: No local workflows. Click Sync from Coze.
